data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding the visibility of the date of last inspection.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate whether the date of the last inspection is visible on the equipment tag/QR code. However, the evidence provided does not include any information or checks related to the visibility of the date of last inspection on the QR code or equipment tag. This lack of evidence leads to an inconclusive status as the requirement cannot be confirmed or denied based on the available data.
gaps: No evidence confirming the visibility of the date of last inspection on the equipment tag/QR code.
